properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The door is open come on in as you are All you need to bring is what remains of your heart I see the years of fear and pain on your face but take a step, enter in you’re safe in this place

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You’re never too broken to belong Never too wounded, never too far gone Here you find Jesus and find your home You’re never too broken to belong

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come find the perfect love that no one deserves A piece of sweet that can’t be put into words And grace that’s greater than the darkest of sin Taste and see, take his hand and let the healing begin

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Each of who’ve wounded and defeated so we know how you feel But by the wounds of our redeemer we believe, we were healed
